name: Applesauce Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg and cloves.
2. Add baking soda to the applesauce (mix well).
3. Mix in the applesauce, oil, walnuts and raisins until the batter is creamy.
4. Pour batter into an 9-inch by 13-inch pan sprayed with pan spray or greased with margarine.
5. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes, or until bars pull away from the sides of the pan and a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let cool on a wire rack.
7. Cut into three by six-inch pieces.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 17g; PRO: 2G; FAT: 5g; CAL: 122
